title: GoTaq qPCR (Promega)
description: Promega BRYT Green dye 20 uL qPCR: 2 min 95 C hot-start activation, 40 cycles, melt-curve analysis.

payload.notes: BRYT Green dye chemistry (spectrally similar to SYBR Green I; use SYBR Green I optical settings). Run a melt curve to verify specificity (Promega does not publish numeric melt settings, so use your cycler's default melt program). Standard cycling shown (95 C 15 sec, 60 C 1 min); for fast cycling use 95 C 3 sec, 60 C 30 sec. Primers 200 nM-1 uM each (0.2-0.9 uM is a good starting range). The 2X mix already contains a low level of CXR (ROX-equivalent) reference dye; on high-reference-dye instruments add 0.2 uL of the supplied 30 uM CXR Reference Dye per reaction (300 nM final). 40 cycles. Source: Promega GoTaq qPCR Master Mix Technical Manual TM318, https://www.promega.com/-/media/files/resources/protocols/technical-manuals/101/gotaq-qpcr-master-mix-protocol.pdf
